newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent reported event was 1H FY26 results (revenue A$673.6m +6.6%, net income A$43.8m +8.9%) released earlier in 2026; the coolants/water-treatment chemistry pathway to AI compute remains speculative with no new evidence.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: no new evidence the chemical-distribution book is supplying coolants/water-treatment to compute sites. Solid but generic 1H growth doesn't validate the speculative AI-input pathway. Prior 'down' was a price/alpha-compression call (now applied separately); fundamentally a hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Coolant/water-treatment chemistry demand if compute build-out sources new suppliers
verdicts.primaryRisk: Diversified industrial distributor; AI linkage remains unproven
verdicts.bull: Largest AU chemical distributor with steady mid-single-digit growth; optionality on data-center coolant/water chemistry.
verdicts.neutral: Healthy distributor but AI-node read-through is conjecture; no contracts disclosed.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical industrial chemical book with no demonstrated compute-site exposure.
